---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* Remove Quarto spacing from this homepage */
  body:has(#gy-hero-v2) main.content,
  body:has(#gy-hero-v2) #quarto-content,
  body:has(#gy-hero-v2) .page-columns {
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 {
    position: relative !important;
    width: 100vw !important;
    min-height: 610px !important;
    margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw) !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    display: flex !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    background: #082f24 !important;
    isolation: isolate;
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 .gy-slideshow-v2 {
    position: absolute !important;
    inset: 0 !important;
    z-index: 0 !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 .gy-slide-v2 {
    position: absolute !important;
    inset: 0 !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
    max-width: none !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    border: 0 !important;
    object-fit: cover !important;
    object-position: center center !important;
    opacity: 0 !important;
    transform: scale(1.02);
    transition: opacity 1.5s ease-in-out !important;
    animation: gyZoomV2 12s ease-out infinite alternate;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 .gy-slide-v2.is-active {
    opacity: 1 !important;
  }

  @keyframes gyZoomV2 {
    from {
      transform: scale(1.02);
    }

    to {
      transform: scale(1.08);
    }
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 .gy-overlay-v2 {
    position: absolute !important;
    inset: 0 !important;
    z-index: 1 !important;
    background:
      linear-gradient(
        90deg,
        rgba(3, 29, 22, 0.94) 0%,
        rgba(3, 29, 22, 0.80) 38%,
        rgba(3, 29, 22, 0.38) 68%,
        rgba(3, 29, 22, 0.12) 100%
      ) !important;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 .gy-content-v2 {
    position: relative !important;
    z-index: 2 !important;
    width: min(760px, 90%) !important;
    margin-left: max(5vw, 45px) !important;
    padding: 72px 0 !important;
    color: #ffffff !important;
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 .gy-title-v2 {
    max-width: 760px !important;
    margin: 0 0 24px !important;
    color: #ffffff !important;
    font-family: Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif !important;
    font-size: clamp(40px, 3.8vw, 58px) !important;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    line-height: 1.08 !important;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42);
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 .gy-description-v2 {
    max-width: 650px !important;
    margin: 0 0 32px !important;
    color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96) !important;
    font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif !important;
    font-size: 20px !important;
    line-height: 1.6 !important;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 .gy-buttons-v2 {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-wrap: wrap !important;
    gap: 14px !important;
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 .gy-button-v2 {
    display: inline-flex !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    justify-content: center !important;
    min-height: 54px !important;
    padding: 14px 24px !important;
    border-radius: 5px !important;
    font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif !important;
    font-size: 14px !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.035em !important;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    transition: transform 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease !important;
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 .gy-button-primary-v2 {
    color: #ffffff !important;
    background: #256844 !important;
    border: 1px solid #256844 !important;
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 .gy-button-secondary-v2 {
    color: #ffffff !important;
    background: rgba(4, 28, 21, 0.30) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.82) !important;
  }

  #gy-hero-v2 .gy-button-v2:hover {
    color: #ffffff !important;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  .gy-welcome-v2 {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 65px 35px;
  }

  @media (max-width: 767px) {
    #gy-hero-v2 {
      min-height: 610px !important;
      align-items: flex-end !important;
    }

    #gy-hero-v2 .gy-slide-v2 {
      animation: none !important;
    }

    #gy-hero-v2 .gy-overlay-v2 {
      background: rgba(3, 29, 22, 0.72) !important;
    }

    #gy-hero-v2 .gy-content-v2 {
      width: 100% !important;
      margin: 0 !important;
      padding: 52px 24px 46px !important;
      box-sizing: border-box !important;
    }

    #gy-hero-v2 .gy-title-v2 {
      width: 100% !important;
      max-width: 100% !important;
      font-size: clamp(36px, 10vw, 46px) !important;
      line-height: 1.06 !important;
    }

    #gy-hero-v2 .gy-description-v2 {
      width: 100% !important;
      max-width: 100% !important;
      font-size: 16px !important;
      line-height: 1.55 !important;
    }

    #gy-hero-v2 .gy-buttons-v2 {
      flex-direction: column !important;
      width: 100% !important;
    }

    #gy-hero-v2 .gy-button-v2 {
      width: 100% !important;
      box-sizing: border-box !important;
    }
  }
</style>

<section id="gy-hero-v2">

  <div class="gy-slideshow-v2" aria-hidden="true">
    <img src="images/hero-18-phoenix-skyline.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2 is-active" alt="" fetchpriority="high">
    <img src="images/hero-01-san-diego-community-garden.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-02-lima-urban-garden.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-10-peru-sand-dunes.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-11-florida-orchard.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-04-florida-home-food-forest.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-08-backyard-food-forest.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-13-market-garden.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-07-lima-community-garden.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-16-garden-tour.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-12-mango-grower.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-17-home-garden-harvest.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-09-australia-garden-tour.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-05-california-orchard.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-03-food-forest-tour.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-15-arizona-food-forest.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-14-phoenix-koi-pond.jpg" class="gy-slide-v2" alt="">
  </div>

  <div class="gy-overlay-v2"></div>

  <div class="gy-content-v2">
    <h1 class="gy-title-v2">
      What does abundance look like around the world?
    </h1>

    <p class="gy-description-v2">
      Join us as we explore food forests, edible landscapes, and the inspiring
      people creating abundance through plants and food in different places.
    </p>

    <div class="gy-buttons-v2">
      <a class="gy-button-v2 gy-button-primary-v2" href="videos.html">
        Explore the Tours
      </a>

      <a
        class="gy-button-v2 gy-button-secondary-v2"
        href="https://www.youtube.com/@thegreenyardaz"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener">
        ▶ Watch on YouTube
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>

<section class="gy-welcome-v2">
  <h2>Welcome to The Green Yard</h2>
  <p>More coming soon...</p>
</section>

<script>
  (function () {
    function startHeroSlideshow() {
      const slides = document.querySelectorAll("#gy-hero-v2 .gy-slide-v2");

      if (slides.length < 2) return;

      let current = 0;

      window.setInterval(function () {
        slides[current].classList.remove("is-active");
        current = (current + 1) % slides.length;
        slides[current].classList.add("is-active");
      }, 6500);
    }

    if (document.readyState === "loading") {
      document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", startHeroSlideshow);
    } else {
      startHeroSlideshow();
    }
  })();
</script>
```
